calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Amend Record Of Birth Of Theresa Alchera
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ory Sandel of The Idell Firm telephone number 415-986-2400 for Petitioner Michael Muscardini.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MICHAEL MUSCARDINI'S Petition To Amend Record Of Birth Of Theresa Alchera is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The California Department of Public Health-Vital Records is directed to amend the record/certificate of birth of Theresa Alchera by removing Angelena De Zordo as the mother of Theresa Alchera and substituting Veronica De Zordo as the mother of Theresa Alchera. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
